nasb.text: Elijah took his mantle and folded it together and struck the waters, and they were divided here and there, so that the two of them crossed over on dry ground.

esv.text: Then Elijah took his cloak and rolled it up and struck the water, and the water was parted to the one side and to the other, till the two of them could go over on dry ground.

cnv.text: 以利亞拿著自己的外衣，把它捲起，擊打河水，河水就左右分開，他們二人就在乾地上走過去了。

ccb.text: 以利亚脱下外衣卷起来，用它击打河水，水立即左右分开，二人脚踏干地而过。
